ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment run */,
  "beam_energy" INTEGER /* Energy of the beam in GeV */,
  "sensor_thickness" INTEGER /* Thickness of the sensor in µm */,
  "un_irradiated_diode_hv" INTEGER /* High voltage of the un-irradiated diode in V */,
  "irradiated_diode_hv" INTEGER /* High voltage of the irradiated diode in V */,
  "num_events" INTEGER /* Number of events recorded */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., collision, decay) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_un_irradiated_diode_hv FOREIGN KEY ("un_irradiated_diode_hv") REFERENCES diode_voltages ("voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_sensor_thickness FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_thickness") REFERENCES sensor_thicknesses ("thickness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_irradiated_diode_hv FOREIGN KEY ("irradiated_diode_hv") REFERENCES diode_voltages ("voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_beam_energy FOREIGN KEY ("beam_energy") REFERENCES beam_energies ("energy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beam_energies" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beam energy */,
  "energy_value" INTEGER /* Value of the beam energy in GeV */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beam energy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the beam energy record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the beam energy record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the beam energy record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the beam energy record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_thicknesses" (
  "thickness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor thickness */,
  "thickness_value" INTEGER /* Value of the sensor thickness in µm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor thickness */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sensor thickness record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor thickness record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the sensor thickness record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor thickness record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thickness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diode_voltages" (
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diode voltage */,
  "un_irradiated_voltage" INTEGER /* High voltage of the un-irradiated diode in V */,
  "irradiated_voltage" INTEGER /* High voltage of the irradiated diode in V */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diode voltages */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the diode voltage record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the diode voltage record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the diode voltage record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the diode voltage record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voltage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment run */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., collision, decay) */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event within the experimental setup */,
  "event_energy" REAL /* Energy of the event in GeV */,
  "event_momentum" REAL /* Momentum of the event in GeV/c */,
  "event_charge" REAL /* Charge of the event in elementary charge units */,
  "event_mass" REAL /* Mass of the event in GeV/c² */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., valid, invalid, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number for the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the run */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_run_number FOREIGN KEY ("run_number") REFERENCES experiments ("run_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed (e.g., IP geolocation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment run */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., draft, published, deprecated) */,
  "version_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data version */,
  "version_updater" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data version */,
  "version_published_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_updater FOREIGN KEY ("version_updater") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_creator FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment run the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, HDF5) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_uploader" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_uploader FOREIGN KEY ("file_uploader") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_creator FOREIGN KEY ("file_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment run the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, Markdown) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_uploader" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_file_uploader FOREIGN KEY ("file_uploader") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_file_creator FOREIGN KEY ("file_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
